families.read: get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc._id, registered: true }).count() > 0
families.write: get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc._id, role: 'chef', registered: true }).count() > 0

users.read: auth.openid == doc._openid || (doc.role == 'chef' && get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, registered: true }).count() > 0)

dishes.read: get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, registered: true }).count() > 0
dishes.write: get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, role: 'chef', registered: true }).count() > 0

orders.read: auth.openid == doc._openid || get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, role: 'chef', registered: true }).count() > 0

wishes.read: get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, registered: true }).count() > 0
wishes.write: auth.openid == doc._openid || get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, role: 'chef', registered: true }).count() > 0

reward_messages.read: auth.openid == doc._openid || get('database.users').where({ _openid: auth.openid, familyId: doc.familyId, role: 'chef', registered: true }).count() > 0
